title: helinus lanceolatus
intro: Helinus lanceolatus, also known as the silver thistle, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, due to its analgesic and antipyretic properties. Helinus lanceolatus can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
